description: Cursor 左下角通知/推广弹窗（Notification Toast）专用翻译。修改后重新运行 Cursor_Localization_Tool.py 注入生效。
entries: 智能体窗口中的自动化
Set up always-on agents that work autonomously without any prompting
设置无需提示即可自主工作的常驻智能体
Agents run based on schedules or triggers, with custom instructions and tools
智能体根据计划或触发器运行，支持自定义指令和工具
Until May 27th, all agent runs for newly created automations are 50% off
截至 5 月 27 日，新创建的自动化智能体运行均可享 50% 折扣
Cursor will automatically kick off a cloud agent for every new git commit to identify critical bugs before they hit production.
Cursor 将在每次新的 git 提交时自动启动云端智能体，在生产环境之前识别关键缺陷。
Always-on agents work silently in the background, share summary analyses in Slack, and produce PRs for safe fixes.
常驻智能体在后台静默工作，在 Slack 中分享摘要分析，并为安全修复生成 PR。
Coordinate long-horizon tasks with delegated subagents
通过委派子智能体协调长期任务
Scores closely with leading models as a result of continued pretraining and RL
通过持续预训练和强化学习，性能接近领先模型
Get more included usage than other leading models with standard and fast variants
标准版与快速版均比其他领先模型包含更多用量
Get Cursor Pro for more Agent usage, Cloud Agents, and more.
升级到 Cursor Pro 以获取更多智能体用量、云端智能体等。
Get Cursor Pro for more Agent usage, Cloud Agents, and more
升级到 Cursor Pro 以获取更多智能体用量、云端智能体等。
Get Cursor Pro for more Agent usage, unlimited Tab, and more.
升级到 Cursor Pro 以获取更多 Agent 用量、无限 Tab 等。
Get Cursor Pro for more Agent usage, unlimited Tab, and more
升级到 Cursor Pro 以获取更多 Agent 用量、无限 Tab 等。
Run async subagents to parallelize your requests instead of adding them to the queue
运行异步子智能体并行处理请求，而不是加入队列等待
Ask Cursor to multitask on queued messages instead of waiting for the run to finish
让 Cursor 对队列中的消息进行多任务处理，无需等待当前运行结束
在 Cursor 3 中立即试用
Want to launch Cursor from the command line?
要从命令行启动 Cursor 吗？
You can add the `code` or `cursor` commands now, or later with Ctrl+Shift+P and typing 'install code command'.
您现在即可添加 `code` 或 `cursor` 命令；也可稍后按 Ctrl+Shift+P，输入「install code command」进行安装。
You can add the `code` or `cursor` commands now, or later with **Ctrl+Shift+P** and typing 'install code command'.
您现在即可添加 `code` 或 `cursor` 命令；也可稍后按 **Ctrl+Shift+P**，输入「install code command」进行安装。

You can add the `code` or `cursor` commands now, or later with Ctrl+Shift+P and typing 「install code command」。
您现在即可添加 `code` 或 `cursor` 命令；也可稍后按 Ctrl+Shift+P，输入「install code command」进行安装。

Bring your VS Code setup to Cursor. Import your settings and extensions for a seamless start.
将 VS Code 配置带到 Cursor。导入设置与扩展，即可无缝上手。
Bring your VS Code setup to Cursor.
将 VS Code 配置带到 Cursor。
导入 VS Code 配置
This will import your VS Code setup, including:
这将导入您的 VS Code 配置，包括：
Importing... This can take a minute
正在导入…这可能需要一分钟。
Import your settings and extensions for a seamless start.
导入设置与扩展，即可无缝上手。
Did the agent understand what you wanted?
智能体是否理解您的需求？
Was the response easy to read and use?
回复是否易于阅读和使用？
Disable Inline Diffs: Enable auto-keep to have changes be updated automatically. You can also do this later in Cursor Settings.
禁用内联差异：启用自动保留后，更改将自动更新。您也可以稍后在 Cursor 设置中配置。
Delivers stronger performance on complex, multi-step coding tasks than Opus 4.7
在复杂的多步骤编码任务上表现优于 Opus 4.7
Get identical quality and capabilities with faster responses at a higher cost per token
以更高的每 token 成本获得相同质量与能力，响应更快
